purpose: Seed Arena Cat Effectiveness gold cases with external task, skill, oracle and verifier data.

candidate_cases.reason: Offline-ish DOCX artifact case with one narrow subject skill, visible fixtures, concrete output path and strong verifier for placeholders, headers/footers, nested tables and conditionals.
JSON artifact and clear hidden oracle, but the subject skill is network/search-heavy and better after the first offline-ish proof.
CSV artifact with hard ground-truth verifier.
JSON graph plus DOT artifact with strong schema and graph correctness verifier.
Excel recovery artifact with workbook content verifier and unsafe/failure pressure.
Clinical CSV harmonization case with numeric formatting and unit-conversion verifier.
PDF plus Excel workbook case with sheet structure, aggregation and mixed-replay pressure.
Security rule case with false-positive and false-negative pressure.
